SEARCH
Package com.apigee.openapi.converter

Class ApigeeApiConfig

java.lang.Object
com.apigee.openapi.converter.ApigeeApiConfig
public class ApigeeApiConfig extends Object
Configuration for connecting to the Apigee Management API.

Supports both Apigee X/hybrid (Google Cloud) and Apigee Edge configurations.

Usage Examples

Using service account JSON file path:


 ApigeeApiConfig config = ApigeeApiConfig.builder()
     .organization("my-org")
     .serviceAccountKeyPath(Path.of("/path/to/service-account.json"))
     .build();

Using service account JSON string:


 ApigeeApiConfig config = ApigeeApiConfig.builder()
     .organization("my-org")
     .serviceAccountKeyJson(jsonString)
     .build();

Using pre-created GoogleCredentials:


 GoogleCredentials creds = GoogleCredentials.getApplicationDefault();
 ApigeeApiConfig config = ApigeeApiConfig.builder()
     .organization("my-org")
     .credentials(creds)
     .build();

  • Method Details

    • getOrganization

      public String getOrganization()
      Returns the Apigee organization name.

    • getBaseUrl

      public String getBaseUrl()
      Returns the base URL for the Apigee Management API.

    • getCredentials

      public com.google.auth.oauth2.GoogleCredentials getCredentials()
      Returns the Google credentials for authentication.

    • getProxyHostname

      public String getProxyHostname()
      Returns the Apigee proxy hostname (e.g., "10.43.65.12.nip.io"). This is used to construct the server URL in the generated OpenAPI spec. May be null if not set.

    • getAccessToken

      public String getAccessToken() throws IOException
      Returns an access token for API authentication. The token is automatically refreshed if expired.
      Returns:
      Access token string
      Throws:
      IOException - if token retrieval fails

    • builder

      public static ApigeeApiConfig.Builder builder()
      Creates a new builder instance.
